scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend/home && npm install --prefix frontend/admin && npm install --prefix frontend/tutor && npm install --prefix frontend/student
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,HOME,ADMIN,TUTOR,STUDENT -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/home" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/admin" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/tutor" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/student"
